'''Trophan Thanis''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Noonar]] some [[Time/Legends|time]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Facing serious problems with [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] raiding [[Starship/Legends|ships]] from [[Nebula Consumables]] in the [[Noonian system]], he sent a message to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gergris]] in the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] pleading for greater [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Fleet]] presence in that [[Star system/Legends|system]]. One of Thanis' subordinates, a [[General/Legends|General]] [[Kozar]], confiscated an abundance of Nebula Consumables food when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base of [[Movris]] was [[Battle of Movris|shut down]]. This lead Thanis to suspect that the pirates were in reality [[Rebel privateer]]s.
